title: Stale Current Memory Planning Check
goal: Implement #437 so optional/deprecated current-memory notes are checked against planning state and stale active-work claims are cheap to repair.
non_goals: Do not make current-memory authoritative over planning.
Do not reintroduce current-memory seed notes into this repo or package payloads.
Do not add a new command surface.

intent.outcome: If current-memory notes claim active work that contradicts .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml, current check reports a compact repair recommendation.
intent.constraints: Memory remains weak-authority and optional; planning state remains authoritative for current active work.
intent.latitude: Use the existing memory current check/report path and tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if detecting this requires broad planning parser reuse or a new shipped workflow surface.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit, push, close #437, refresh evidence, and continue the next footprint slice.
execution.proof: memory installer tests, memory ruff, live current check, planning surfaces, summary/reconcile/proof dogfooding, planning doctor

invariants: Current-memory notes stay optional/deprecated and weak-authority.
No current-memory notes are recreated in this repo unless needed as fixtures.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #436 adds footprint pressure for long-running package artifacts; #449 makes package use cheaper than bypassing it.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #437, continue #439/#440/#441 footprint slices or the next higher-priority roadmap lane

active_milestone.scope: Detect planning/current-memory contradiction and keep repo current notes absent.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make stale current-memory against planning state visible and repairable.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add authority to current-memory.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The fix would require a new command or broad planner parser dependency.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #437, refresh evidence, and continue the next footprint slice.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/stale-current-memory-planning-check.plan.json packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/installer.py packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-memory-bootstrap current check --target . --format json
rg "April 13|old active execplan|older April proof pass" .agentic-workspace packages/memory -n
completion_criteria: Current-memory check flags a deprecated/current note that claims active work while planning state has no active item.
The warning recommends update, shrink, clear, or delete/disable instead of treating current-memory as authority.
The current repo still has no stale current-memory project/task notes.
Proof and closeout route the larger footprint lane forward.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: current-memory check now compares existing deprecated/current project-state and task-context notes against planning state; when planning has no active item but a note claims active/current work, it emits a compact manual-review action with shrink-or-remove remediation.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused current-memory tests, full memory installer tests, memory ruff, live current check, planning surfaces, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and package-local proof commands passed.
execution_summary.resume from: next footprint or command-generation roadmap slice after evidence refresh
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Keep regression tests and the current check remediation fields as durable evidence; discard transient test-process crash output because the same test and full suite reran cleanly. The stale-reference sweep only found the intentional regression fixture.

discard.summary: Transient Windows Python access violation from the first full memory test run; targeted and full reruns passed cleanly.
Intermediate command transcripts and fixture setup details.

continuation.summary: Continue remaining footprint-control child slices and the operating-cost parent lane.

config_check.summary: packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py guards idle-planning contradiction detection and allows inactive current-memory wording.

issue_follow_up.summary: Close #437 with proof; keep #436 and #449 open until remaining child slices land.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Detect stale current-memory notes against planning state and make repair cheap.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: current check flags active/current claims when planning state has no active item, exposes shrink-or-remove remediation, and live repo current check reports no stale notes.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane operational-footprint-pressure activates a fresh bounded slice.

cost_assessment.reason: Weak agents get a direct repair signal from an existing check instead of reading stale current-context notes or manually comparing memory against planning.

improvement_signal_review.finding: Optional current-memory could reintroduce stale active-work context after planning became idle.
improvement_signal_review.resolution: The existing current check now treats planning as authoritative and recommends update, shrink, clear, or delete/disable.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Repo current-memory notes are already absent; the durable fix is to make stale reintroduction detectable through existing current check.

proof_report.validation proof: focused current-memory tests, full memory installer tests, memory ruff, live current check, planning surfaces, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and package-local proof commands passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: yes; validation evidence is recorded in execution summary.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: focused current-memory tests, full memory installer tests, memory ruff, live current check, planning surfaces, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and package-local proof commands passed.
